title: pinus patula subsp. tecunumanii
intro: Pinus patula subsp. tecunumanii, also known as tecunumán, is a subspecies of the patula pine tree, native to Central America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pinus patula subsp. tecunumanii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and it can also be used in the form of essential oils and extracts to harness its medicinal properties.
